task_updates.executor_notes: §3 authored as a 12-row Gate|Verification|Pass-criterion markdown table covering: Phase 1 soak passed (:642-644); 5-table schema applied; named indexes present per :130-132+:189-191 (topics_state_idx, topics_revisit_idx, topics_headline_trgm, topic_sources_message_idx, transitions_topic_idx, transitions_run_idx, transitions_action_idx); backfill row-count parity for state='posted' vs live_update_feed_items and state='watching' vs live_update_watchlist; runner lease key per :684; trace embed in prod TODO(phase-1) e channel; legacy editor still running (latest live_update_editor_runs row under <run-source discriminator = legacy> within last hour); operator paged-in window; ALL SIX Phase-1 TODOs resolved (toggle, suppression mechanism, Branch-B marker, bot identities, trace channel, run-source discriminator); Phase 1 shipped Branch A or Branch B (not hybrid/per-guild/per-channel/partial-guild); run-source discriminator present (sample SELECT shows distinct legacy/new). End-statement: 'If any gate is RED, do not flip. Consult docs/live-update-editor-redesign.md and reschedule.' Explicit ABORT-to-§11 for third-mechanism or missing discriminator. §4 authored as Signal|GO|TUNE|ABORT table keyed on Phase-1 signals from :611-644/:599-604: replay-divergence explainability; collision-override rate <10%/10-25%/>25% citing :603; record_observation rate 1-3/run / <1/run TUNE citing :602; Phase-1 shadow-attempted-publish partials 0 GO / 1 TUNE (counts toward cross-window trip-wire) / ≥2 ABORT citing :600-601; schema-rejection rate <10%/10-50%/>50% citing :676; cost/run ≤3× / 3-5× / >5× citing :690; latency/run scheduler-cadence-aware citing :633. Annotation above the table: 'Sourced from Phase-1 telemetry (trace embed + shadow logs), NOT from topics WHERE environment=dev — Phase 1 runs with publishing OFF per :611/:627/:633.' Decision rules: GO=proceed to §5; TUNE=delay flip + consult redesign for collision threshold/rejection-rate/cost; ABORT=walk away from Phase 2 this week and re-open redesign.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Confirmed: §3 preconditions table includes both 'Phase 1 shipped Branch A or Branch B (not a third mechanism)' as one gate AND 'Run-source discriminator present' as a separate gate, explicitly noting all SIX Phase-1 TODOs must be resolved (the previous row in the table enumerates a-f including (f) run-source discriminator). Explicit ABORT-to-§11 for third mechanism OR missing discriminator. §4 rubric annotates the partial-publish row 'Sourced from Phase-1 telemetry (trace embed in Phase-1 monitoring channel + shadow logs per :611-644), NOT from topics WHERE environment=dev — Phase 1 runs with publishing OFF per :611/:627/:633.' The shadow-attempted-publish partial count is a telemetry counter, never an SQL query against topics in dev.
